response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience across diverse domains, including embedded systems, low-latency applications, and cloud infrastructure. However, his background lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization, which are core requirements for this role. His expertise in web and general-purpose software development does not align closely with the specialized hardware and deep-learning workload focus of the Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Strong software development background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with low-latency applications and performance optimization in distributed systems
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
Limited exposure to AI accelerator architectures or deep-learning workload optimization
Background is primarily in general-purpose software development rather than hardware-centric roles
